title: OPEN BUSINESS ADVISING - 211info
text: LIVELIHOOD NW OPEN BUSINESS ADVISING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for people to access information and resources about running a business, including planning and strategy development, market research, human resources support, financial analysis, loan packaging, and specialized information and referral. It also offers a course focused specifically on assistance with accounting and bookkeeping systems. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on individuals who identify as female, BIPOC, or LGBTQ2+ Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 988-8255 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-8255 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Business development: None Other services: Varies DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Business Development Business Development * African American Community Business Development * Asian Community Business Development * Hispanic/Latino Community Business Development * LGBTQ2+ Individuals Business Development * Native American Community Business Development * Women If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIVELIHOOD NW
